sections.description: Root source directory for the Vue.js dashboard SPA, containing the app entry point, Vue root component, and all sub-modules.
sections.purpose: Organizes the dashboard frontend into api/, composables/, components/, utils/, styles/, and __tests__/ sub-directories following Vue 3 Composition API conventions.
strengths: Clean separation: API client, composables, components, utilities, and styles each in their own directory
Single entry point (main.ts) mounts the app and imports global styles
weaknesses: No router — single-page only; would need vue-router if dashboard grows to multiple views
sections.test_coverage: Tests in __tests__/ directory cover utility functions (format.ts, heatmap.ts). No component tests.
dependencies: ./styles/global.css — CSS custom properties and base reset
sections.functionality:
- main.ts creates and mounts the Vue app
- App.vue is the root component that orchestrates all composables and child components
- Sub-directories contain all feature code
sections.files:
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| main.ts | App entry point: creates Vue app, imports global CSS, mounts to #app |
| App.vue | Root component: wires useTimeRange, useAutoRefresh, useDashboardData composables; renders header, error banner, summary cards, activity trends, time series charts, and collapsible sections |
